system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Medicine TN 9 -1 Rank/Dianxue, Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

Using your knowledge of meridian points and Qi flow, you tap a person in chest to reverse blood flow. Make a Medicine Skill roll (TN 9 -1 per Rank of Dianxue). On a Success you can then briefly lower the Hardiness of anyone you strike with your bare palm using the Arm Strike Skill. You lower their Hardiness by 1 per Qi level you possess for a number of rounds equal to your Dianxue Ranking. Requirement: Must have 1 Rank in Medicine to use. Cathartic: The effect of your strike last longer with Hardiness points recovering at a rate of 1 per day using the normal Draining Skills rules from CHAPTER TWO: RULES of the Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate rulebook.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetDrainsNote: Normal Hardiness drain lasts for rounds equal to Dianxue rank. Cathartic drain recovers at 1 per day under the Chapter 2 draining rules.
system.requirementNotes: Must have 1 Rank in Medicine to use.
system.catharticEffect: The effect of your strike last longer with Hardiness points recovering at a rate of 1 per day using the normal Draining Skills rules from CHAPTER TWO: RULES of the Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate rulebook.
